support_tiers.label: Strong support
support_tiers.description: Purpose-built video subscriptions with first-class routing and durable identifiers.

support_tiers.label: Generic support
support_tiers.description: Generic RSSHub or RSS intake substrate for broad article-style coverage without overclaiming route-by-route verification.

templates.label: YouTube channel
templates.description: Strong preset for recurring YouTube intake when you already know the channel ID, handle, or landing URL.
templates.fill_now: Start with the channel ID or a stable channel URL, then keep the RSSHub route aligned.
templates.proof_boundary: YouTube is a strong path today, but route health still matters if you depend on RSSHub for intake.

templates.label: Bilibili uploader
templates.description: Strong preset for Bilibili creators when the UID is known and you want a repeatable creator feed.
templates.fill_now: Use the creator UID as the primary identifier and keep the companion RSSHub route ready.
templates.proof_boundary: Bilibili creator intake is productized, but route breakage or source-side changes still need monitoring.

templates.label: Generic RSSHub route
templates.description: General preset for wider source coverage when RSSHub can normalize a route into a usable feed.
templates.fill_now: Bring the exact RSSHub route you want SourceHarbor to poll, then add a canonical source URL only if it helps operators recognize the feed.
templates.proof_boundary: Do not assume every RSSHub route is equally solid. Treat each route as proven only after it survives real runs.
templates.evidence_note: Substrate does not block RSSHub universe, but routes are not claimed as individually verified.

templates.label: Generic RSS or Atom feed
templates.description: General preset for any source that already exposes a clean RSS or Atom feed without a platform-specific shortcut.
templates.fill_now: Paste the exact RSS or Atom feed URL into Source value. Leave Source URL empty unless you want to store the same feed URL explicitly.
templates.proof_boundary: Feed quality varies a lot. If the feed is noisy or incomplete, the intake surface should stay honest about that.
templates.evidence_note: Use Source value for the exact feed URL; Source URL stays optional unless you want to store the same feed URL explicitly.
